headline: Single women see homeownership as 'a wealth-building tool,' economist says, but buying remains a challenge
summary: For years, single men who were first-time homebuyers had higher annual income than their female counterparts, according to the National Association of Realtors.

headline: CoStar Group Announces Winners of Fifth Annual CoStar Impact Awards
summary: ARLINGTON, Va., March 25, 2026--CoStar Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: CSGP), a leading provider of online real estate marketplaces, information, analytics, and 3D digital twin technology in the property markets, today announced the winners of the 2026 CoStar Impact Awards.

raw.headline: CoStar Group Announces Winners of Fifth Annual CoStar Impact Awards

headline: How The CoStar Group (CSGP) Investment Story Is Shifting After Homescom And Activist Pressure
summary: CoStar Group’s modeled fair value has been trimmed slightly, with the price target moving from US$65.42 to US$64.89 per share. Analysts link this reset to a broader round of refreshed targets following Q4 results, updated 2026 and medium term guidance, and mixed views on the Homes.com investment case. As you read on, you will see how these shifting price targets fit into the evolving story around growth, risk, and what to watch next. Analyst Price Targets don't always capture the full story...
